g.text: Modules: education · memory · contacts | Adaptive tutoring with SM-2 spaced repetition, mind maps, and personalized curricula
Tools: mind_maps · mind_map_nodes · mind_map_edges · mind_map_queries · mastery · spaced_repetition · diagnostic · curriculum · teaching_flows · analytics
1 User asks to study a topic via Telegram → "Teach me Python"
2 Switchboard routes to Education Butler → teaching_flow_start(topic, goal)
3 Diagnostic assessment determines current level → diagnostic_start() → probe questions → diagnostic_complete()
4 Curriculum planner creates adaptive learning path → curriculum_generate() → concept DAG → topological sort
5 Teaching flow presents material with spaced repetition scheduling → teaching_flow_advance() → Socratic dialogue → quiz
6 Mastery tracker updates scores after each interaction → mastery_record_response(node_id, quality=0-5, response_type)
7 Teaching flow loops to next node or concludes session → teaching_flow_advance() → status: completed / next concept
8 Session ends; nightly job aggregates performance → (scheduled) compute_analytics_snapshots() → velocity · retention · mastered_count
LLM reads analytics snapshots for past 7 days across all active maps
→ identifies trends: velocity, retention rates, struggling areas
→ highlights achievements: mastered nodes, streaks, improvements
